examples: Cross the name of the dead person off the list

meanings.definition: put out or be put out by a strikeout
examples: Oral struck out three batters to close the inning
The candidate struck out with his health care plan

meanings.definition: make a motion as with one's fist or foot towards an object or away from one's body

examples: the runner was put out at third base

meanings.definition: set out on a course of action
examples: He struck out on his own
